task.title: Submitting a job and obtaining the output
task.shortdesc: You can submit jobs from the Remote Systems view, the z/OS Projects view, or the z Systems LPEX Editor. Completed jobs are listed in the JES subsystem of the Remote Systems view or the Remote System Details view.

taskbody.context: To open job output from either of these views, double-click the job name or select the job name and then select Open from the menu. The output is opened in the z Systems LPEX Editor. For more information about jobs and job output, see these topics:
